span.p:
Inputs
account signals, content engagement,
sales notes, event feedback,
partner signals, CRM updates

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
1. Progression wins
what moved and why?

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
2. Active Focus review
risk, committee coverage,
next action

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
3. Future Pipeline review
signal, relationship path,
nurture asset

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
4. New signals
source, state, strength,
owner, SLA

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
5. Content and proof needs
role, demand state,
owner, due date

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
6. Stalled accounts
fit, timing, access,
proof, budget, consensus

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
7. Metrics
account movement,
committee coverage,
signal quality, opportunities

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
8. Commitments
owner, account or segment,
due date
